cases.name: analyze_issue
cases.prompt: Analyze GitHub issue #123 and tell me if it is still valid.

cases.name: draft_issue_reply
cases.prompt: Draft a reply for this GitHub issue, but do not post it yet.

cases.name: fix_issue_and_pr
cases.prompt: Fix issue #42 and open a PR after I approve the change.
cases.reason: Engineering workflow tied to a GitHub issue.

cases.name: verify_pr_fixes_issue
cases.prompt: Check whether this PR really fixes the linked GitHub issue.

cases.name: generic_code_review
cases.prompt: Review this code diff for bugs and style issues.
cases.reason: Generic code review should use a code-review skill instead.

cases.name: general_git_help
cases.prompt: How do I rename a local git branch?
cases.reason: Generic git help is not GitHub issue handling.
